title: HTTP Forge Environment
description: A named environment file ({env}.json) in the HTTP Forge environments folder. Contains variables available when this environment is selected.

requiresConfirmation.description: When true, HTTP Forge will prompt before running requests in this environment (useful for production)

variables.description: Key-value pairs available as {{variableName}} in requests

secretVariables.description: Names of variables whose values are stored in SecretStorage (OS keychain), not in this file. Only the variable name is persisted here; the value is never written to disk.
